Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Paris 2024 Olympics: The only schedule you need for the rest of the games

The Olympics have been an absolute joy, so don’t miss the biggest events between now and Sunday.

The Paris 2024 Olympics have served up so much drama but there’s plenty more to come in France. Besides, Team SA still has medals to contest.

View the full schedule via the Paris 2024official website.

Tatjana Smith became the most decorated Olympian in South African history with her haul oftwo medalsin Paris. She claimed gold in the 100m breaststroke and silver in the 200m event, an exact reversal of her antics in Tokyo. The other Team SA medallists in 2024 areAlan Hatherlywho won bronze in the men’s Mountain Bike (MTB) cross-country race; South Africa’s first Olympic cycling medal since 1956, some 68 years ago, and theRugby Sevens sidewho claimed bronze by beating Australia.

30-year-old sprinter Akani Simbine, a picture of consistency for the better part of a decade, heartbreakingly missed out on a medal in one of the most iconic 100m finals in Olympic history. Last-placed Jamaican Oblique Seville crossed the line in 9.91, which would have claimed fourth in Tokyo three years ago, just to illustrate how competitive this race was. It’s a familiar feeling for Simbine with consecutive fourth-placed finishes in Olympic finals and a fifth-placed finish in Rio in 2016. He can hold his head extremely high.

For those interested in the GOAT debate in tennis,Novak Djokovic finally drew a line under all thatwith a gold medal to complete his set of tennis accolades.

title: Paris 2024 Olympics: DEFINITIVE guide to the rest of the games
author: James Freemantle
description: The Paris 2024 Olympics have served up so much drama but there's plenty more to come in France. Team SA still has medals to contest.
